name: FERRELLGAS PARTNERS L P
business: Ferrellgas Partners L.P. is a publicly traded limited partnership engaged in the retail distribution of propane and related equipment. It serves residential, industrial/commercial, agricultural, and wholesale customers across the United States. The company also operates the Blue Rhino portable tank exchange brand.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading distributor of propane and related equipment and supplies to customers in the United States.
In the agricultural market, propane is primarily used for crop drying, space heating, irrigation and weed control.

Sales from portable tank exchanges, nationally branded under the name Blue Rhino, are delivered primarily through a network of partnership-owned distribution outlets and to a lesser extent through independently-owned distribution outlets.
Our technology platform allows us to efficiently route and schedule our customer deliveries, customer administration and operational workflow for the retail sale and delivery of bulk propane.
